hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess,pathlib; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); pathlib.Path(p).suffix=='.py' and subprocess.run(['ruff','check',p], cwd=pathlib.Path(p).parent) or None" 2>/dev/null || true
